hypothesis: Introducing aromatic residues at position 5 and hydrophobic residues at position 11 will enhance SSTR2-specific binding by improving complementarity with ECL2/TM5 residues (e.g., 193, 205, 208) while reducing off-target affinity (SSTR3/5) through steric differentiation.

critic_feedback_used.hypothesis: The current design strategy is insufficient to disrupt off-target interactions. A more targeted mutational approach at non-pharmacophore positions is needed to achieve SSTR2 selectivity.

proposed_changes.rationale: Focus on mutating non-pharmacophore positions that are likely involved in off-target interactions (SSTR3/SSTR5 conserved-pocket contacts).
Introduce charged or polar residues at key non-pharmacophore positions to disrupt conserved off-target interactions and improve SSTR2 selectivity.
